title: Nagaraja Cholan MA, MLA.
overview: Amavasai (Sathyaraj) turns Nagaraja Cholan,  a successful politician. Corrupt to the core, the movie begins from where the first part ended. He rises to become a Deputy Chief Minister. The tantrums and political game played by Nagaraja Cholan forms the movie's crux.
